Request is malformed — will fail again
Validate JSON, required fields, model name
Key lacks access — won't fix itself
Reduce input size or split into chunks
Adjust prompt; this won't succeed by retrying
Reduce content size; split into multiple requests
Never retry 4xx client errors unless they're
. Fix the request, credentials, or permissions instead.
The official Python SDK (and other SDKs) automatically retries:
Randomizes wait time to avoid synchronized "retry storms"

import anthropic

# Option 1: Disable SDK retries (you handle retries yourself)
client = anthropic.Anthropic(max_retries=0)

# Option 2: Increase retries globally
client = anthropic.Anthropic(max_retries=4)

# Option 3: Per-request override (via with_options in recent SDKs)
client.with_options(max_retries=5).messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}]
)

= initial delay (e.g. 0.5 s for interactive, 1–2 s for background)

Low perceived latency, avoid long spinners
Re-enqueue failed jobs; use worker processes
Shift heavy workloads to off-peak hours if hitting 429/529
Maximize success rate, tolerate higher latency

response = stripe.Payment.create(
    amount=100,
